news.t: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies

holdings.infoBox: KDVD is an equity ETF with a total of 70 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 0% stock at 4.67%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 3.73%, Solstice Advanced Materials at 2.29%, Regal Rexnord at 2.11%, and Allison Transmission Holdings at 1.99%.

overview.description: The Keeley Dividend ETF (KDVD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation and current income by investing in dividend-paying, small- and mid-cap US equities. The fund uses fundamental research supported by a deep team of sector analysts. KDVD was launched on Dec 8, 2025 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...

data.title: Gabelli Launches Keeley Dividend ETF (KDVD)
